---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report a problem or suggest improvements for documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Type (check one)

- [ ] **Error/Inaccuracy** - Information is incorrect or misleading
- [ ] **Missing Information** - Something is missing or unclear
- [ ] **Outdated Content** - Documentation needs updating
- [ ] **New Documentation Needed** - Add new documentation section
- [ ] **Typo/Grammar** - Minor text corrections
- [ ] **Example Code** - Code examples need improvement or addition
- [ ] **Structure/Format** - Documentation organization issues

## Document Location

**Which document needs improvement?**

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Features documentation
- [ ] Service documentation
- [ ] Installation guide
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] API Reference
- [ ] Other: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

**Specific Section:**
Link or describe the exact section that needs attention.

## Problem Description

Describe the documentation issue clearly.

**Current State:**
What does the documentation currently say or not say?

**Expected State:**
What should the documentation say or include?

## Proposed Change

Provide your suggestion for improvement.

**Suggested Text:**

```
[Your suggested wording or content]
```

**Reasoning:**
Why would this improvement help users?

## Additional Context

- **Screenshots:** If relevant, attach screenshots of the documentation issue
- **Code Examples:** If suggesting code examples, provide the code
- **Related Issues:** Link to related GitHub issues or PRs
- **User Impact:** How does this affect users?

## Testing Documentation

If this is about user-facing features:

- [ ] I tested the feature to verify the documentation
- [ ] The documentation matches the actual behavior
- [ ] I can provide a test case/example

## Priority

How urgent is this documentation fix?

- [ ] Critical - Misleading information causing user errors
- [ ] High - Major confusion or missing important info
- [ ] Medium - Quality improvement, not urgent
- [ ] Low - Minor corrections or enhancements

---

**Thank you for helping improve the documentation!** 📚
